title: Build a Cat Photo App
description: A full cat-themed webpage built with core HTML elements. The app features sections for cat photos, lists of things cats love and hate, images with captions, a footer with a link, and proper document structure including DOCTYPE, lang attribute, head with title and charset meta tag, and a semantic body layout.
objectives: Structure a complete HTML document with DOCTYPE, html, head, and body
Use sections to group related content
Embed images with alt text and wrap them in anchor links
Use figure and figcaption for captioned media
Apply em and strong for text emphasis
Add a footer with an external link
Set charset with a meta void element

files.name: index.html

CatPhotoApp

Cat Photos

Cat Lists

Top 3 things cats hate:

  1. flea treatment
  2. thunder
  3. other cats
